# Casas Vigo - Room Rentals in Vigo, Galicia, Spain

> Furnished rooms for rent in Vigo, Galicia. 5 flats, 27 rooms, 300-400 EUR/month.

## About

Casas Vigo offers furnished rooms for rent in the city of Vigo, Galicia, Spain.
We manage 5 flats with a total of 27 rooms, ideal for students, professionals,
and anyone looking for affordable housing in Vigo.

All rooms include: WiFi, fully equipped kitchen, washing machine, heating.
Prices range from 300 to 400 EUR/month, all included.

## Properties

### Flat 1: Rua Irmandinhos 23 (City Center)
- 4 rooms: Primavera (380 EUR), Verano (350 EUR), Otono (370 EUR), Invierno (340 EUR)
- Renovated flat with elevator, AC, storage room
- Amenities: WiFi, equipped kitchen, washer, dryer, heating, AC, elevator

### Flat 2: Alfonso XIII 9, 1st Right (HST Station area)
- 6 rooms: Blue (350 EUR), Bambu (330 EUR), Estrella (360 EUR), Mundo (340 EUR), Arroba (320 EUR), Prensa (300 EUR)
- Themed rooms, glazed gallery, private patio, 2 bathrooms
- Amenities: WiFi, equipped kitchen, washer, heating

### Flat 3: Alfonso XIII 9, 3rd Left (HST Station area)
- 6 rooms: Mar (340 EUR), Sol (320 EUR), Luna (330 EUR), Viento (310 EUR), Tierra (300 EUR), Fuego (320 EUR)
- Panoramic views of Vigo estuary
- Amenities: WiFi, equipped kitchen, washer, heating

### Flat 4: Alfonso XIII 9, 4th Right Penthouse (HST Station area)
- 5 rooms: Cielo (370 EUR), Nube (350 EUR), Aurora (360 EUR), Rayo (350 EUR), Trueno (340 EUR)
- Penthouse with terrace and city views
- Amenities: WiFi, equipped kitchen, washer, heating, terrace

### Flat 5: Alfonso XIII 9, 4th Left Penthouse (HST Station area)
- 2 rooms: Oceano (400 EUR), Galaxia (370 EUR)
- Premium attic apartment
- Amenities: WiFi, equipped kitchen, washer, heating

## Location

Vigo is the largest city in Galicia, northwestern Spain. Known for:
- Cies Islands (Atlantic Islands National Park)
- Excellent seafood and gastronomy
- High-speed train (AVE) connection
- University of Vigo
- Mild Atlantic climate year-round

## Contact

- WhatsApp: Contact via website
- Website: https://elbenxo.github.io/casas-vigo/
- Languages: Spanish, English, Galician, French, German, Korean, Portuguese, Polish

## Structured Data

- Total flats: 5
- Total rooms: 27
- Price range: 300-400 EUR/month
- City: Vigo, Galicia, Spain
- Addresses: Rua Irmandinhos 23; Alfonso XIII 9 (floors 1R, 3L, 4R, 4L)
- Coordinates: 42.2318, -8.7154 (Alfonso XIII); 42.2365, -8.7145 (Irmandinhos)
